news.t: TappAlpha and Tuttle Capital Launch the T² Lift™ Series with TSYX and TDAX — Light-Leverage Versions of TSPY and TDAQ Designed to Offer 30% More Exposure to Growth + Income

overview.description: The TSPY Lift ETF (TSYX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking to provide 1.3x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of TappAlpha SPY Growth & Daily Income ETF (ticker: TSPY) through total return swap agreements. The reference ETF holds long exposure to the S&P 500 Index and writes daily out-of-the-money calls, using 0DTE options. TSYX was launched on Jan 7, 2026 and is issued by TappAlpha.

data.title: TappAlpha and Tuttle Capital Launch the T² Lift™ Series with TSYX and TDAX — Light-Leverage Versions of TSPY and TDAQ Designed to Offer 30% More Exposure to Growth + Income
data.text: SEATTLE, Jan. 07, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- TappAlpha and Tuttle Capital Management, two innovators in ETF design, today jointly announced the launch of the T² Lift™ Series — a new line of ETFs seeking...
